title: Gorilla Mounting Tape Squares Crystal Clear (1 Pack)
description: From the manufacturer Gorilla Mounting Tape Squares Gorilla Mounting Tape is a quick and easy way to mount. This is a double-sided tape which delivers an instant, crystal clear and weatherproof bond, making it ideal for indoor or outdoor use. With the ability to grip to smooth and rough surfaces, the Gorilla Mounting Tape is perfect for mounting without traditional fasteners. Product Features Crystal Clear Delivers a crystal clear, permanent bond. Easy To Apply Pre-cut squares which are easy to use. Grips Rough & Smooth Surfaces Sticks to smooth and rough surfaces. * Weight limits may vary depending on surface texture, porosity and flatness of surface. Both surfaces must be completely flat to make full contact with adhesive. Gorilla Super Glue 3g Gorilla Super Glue 3g Gel Gorilla Super Glue Brush & Nozzle 10g Gorilla Super Glue Micro Precise 5g Gorilla Contact Adhesive 75g Gorilla Mounting Tape Clear Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 397 4.5 out of 5 stars 73 4.4 out of 5 stars 173 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,863 4.3 out of 5 stars 11,833 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,807 Price £5.23 £ 5 . 23 — no data £7.90 £ 7 . 90 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.98 £ 6 . 98 £6.48 £ 6 . 48 Other Products from Gorilla Fast-setting, Incredibly Versatile and Impact Tough. More Control. Thick, no run gel formula. Two ways to dispense for control and accuracy. Strong and fast formula in a precise dispensing tool designed to fit comfortably in the hand. The flexible, all-round glue that's waterproof. Crystal clear, tough and weatherproof.
